title: Federal Signal Corporation Declares Dividend of $0.15 per share
author: Prnewswire
description: Federal Signal Corporation (NYSE:FSS) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per share, payable on May 29, 2026 to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The company, founded in 1901, designs and manufactures equipment for municipal, governmental, industrial and commercial customers through its Environmental Solutions and Safety and Security Systems segments.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The declaration of a quarterly dividend demonstrates the company's financial health and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. Regular dividend payments are typically viewed positively as they indicate stable cash flows and management confidence in the business outlook.

title: Federal Signal Corporation Increases Quarterly Dividend by 7%
author: Prnewswire
description: Federal Signal Corporation (NYSE:FSS) announced a 7% increase in its quarterly dividend, raising it from $0.14 to $0.15 per share. The dividend is payable on March 26, 2026 to shareholders of record as of March 13, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company increased its quarterly dividend by 7%, demonstrating confidence in financial performance and commitment to returning value to shareholders. Dividend increases are typically viewed as a positive signal of company health and management confidence in future cash flows.

title: Federal Signal Corporation Declares Dividend of $0.14 per share
author: Prnewswire
description: Federal Signal Corporation announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.14 per share, payable on December 2, 2025, to stockholders of record as of November 14, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is proactively returning value to shareholders through a consistent dividend payment, indicating financial stability and commitment to investor returns

title: Family-Owned Trash Truck Maker Snapped Up In Big Federal Signal Acquisition
author: Akanksha Bakshi
description: Federal Signal Corporation announced a $396 million acquisition of New Way Trucks, a family-owned refuse collection vehicle manufacturer, expected to close in Q4 2025 and broaden its waste management capabilities.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is expanding its market presence, expects long-term growth opportunities, and anticipates cost synergies of $15-20 million by 2028
No direct impact from the acquisition, mentioned as a comparative industry reference

title: Why Federal Signal Stock Is Skyrocketing Today
author: Josh Kohn-Lindquist
description: Federal Signal reported strong second-quarter earnings with 15% sales growth, 14% order increase, and 23% adjusted EPS rise. The company raised its 2025 guidance and achieved record EBITDA margins of 19.5%, demonstrating robust performance across its environmental and safety equipment segments.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong quarterly performance with significant revenue and earnings growth, record EBITDA margins, raised guidance, and consistent market leadership in specialized equipment segments
